blocks.text: looked at him for a long moment. Then looked back out the window. She didn't push it.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: You said you didn't look at the listing.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: You have been here forty seconds.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: Elevated position. Private lot. Direct beach access.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Would it kill you to say nice house?

blocks.prompt: Julian looks toward the house next door. What does he do?

options.label: He grabs his bags without another word.
"One of them arrived separately. Within the last hour."
